verdict.answer_first: Both answer immediately; A is slightly clearer with "pick Postgres" while B starts "Postgres."
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder: "pick Postgres" and "MongoDB is the wrong default"; B also commits with "stronger default".
verdict.fabrication: B has the shakier unsupported phrasing: "columnar-aware" for Postgres; A also makes unsupported claims like "slow at scale".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives a default, Mongo exceptions, and escalation path: "Start there, add materialized views / TimescaleDB".
